//: Node-publishable build. Extends the dev tsconfig but flips noEmit off and
emits JS + .d.ts to dist/. rewriteRelativeImportExtensions (TS 5.7+) rewrites
the `.ts` import specifiers used throughout src/ to `.js` in the output, which
is what lets Node resolve the emitted modules. Bun consumers never touch dist/
(the `bun` export condition points them at src/*.ts); this is the Node path.
